title: oldenlandia herbacea var. goetzei
intro: Oldenlandia herbacea var. goetzei, also known as a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a variant of the Oldenlandia herbacea species. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Oldenlandia herbacea var. goetzei include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal use, with the leaves and stems being the primary parts utilized.
